component.name: jterm4
component.summary: Session-aware GTK4 terminal with structured command blocks

description.p: jterm4 combines a traditional VTE terminal with an optional Block mode that keeps commands, output, exit status, duration, and working directory as searchable structured history.

ul.li: VTE tabs and split panes with session restoration
Structured command blocks, search, filtering, bookmarks, and recall
SSH workflows, an asynchronous file tree, and optional AI assistance

description.p: Modernized GTK4 architecture, persistence, security, and desktop packaging.
